text: Bootstrap completed. Dev identity established. Steve (Hollywood) is in Oshawa, Ontario (Eastern Time). Holly AI project is a unique AI partner — not a chatbot. Workflow: plan → review → execute. Cautious autonomy. GitHub connected at iamhollywoodpro/Holly-AI.

Phase A Item 1 COMPLETE: Security audit of docs/COOLIFY_ENV_VARS.md and docs/INTEGRATION_SETUP_GUIDE.md. Removed all real credentials (Neon DB URL, LiveKit API key/secret, server IP 40.233.70.207, creator email, Kokoro TTS URL). Added both files to .gitignore and untracked them from git. Credentials still valid — Steve chose to defer rotation. Note: git history still contains old credentials, but repo is private.

Phase A Items 2-4 COMPLETE: Enabled TypeScript strict mode. Fixed 101 errors across 52 files. Made CI type-check blocking (removed || true). Removed --no-coverage from CI tests. All 947 tests pass, zero strict mode errors. Working on branch fix/typescript-strict-mode. Not yet pushed to GitHub.

Phase B P0 COMPLETE: Added 4 test files (5,226 lines, 484 new tests) covering crisis detection, security modules, sandbox execution, auth pipeline, API keys, and Zod validations. Test count went from 947 to 1,431 (+51%). All passing. Pushed to main.

Phase B P1 COMPLETE: Added 8 test files (5,305 lines, 404 new tests) covering AI smart router, Holly modes, evolution engine, auto-fix engine, error recovery, self-diagnosis, multi-tenant cache, and safety guardrails. Test count went from 1,431 to 1,835 (+28%). All passing. Pushed to main. Found bug: matchesPattern in safety-guardrails.ts has incorrect glob expansion (** becomes .[^/]* instead of .*)

Phase H mobile app audit and fixes committed (a371eb0). Key changes: deleted duplicate pushNotifications.ts, rewrote auth.ts with real Clerk Expo integration, rewrote VoiceButton.tsx with expo-speech-recognition, created offlineQueue.ts with retry logic, updated app.json with asset refs and iOS/Android permissions, added google-services.json placeholder, wrote 51 mobile tests. Root tests: 2,049 passing. Mobile tests need npm install to run.

Phase J (Visual Identity) complete. Created useVisualIdentity.tsx (React context + hook merging server CSS vars with local emotion profile), AuraBackground.tsx (4-layer ambient gradient background reacting to emotional state), LivingHollyOrb.tsx (dynamic orb with server-driven colors, form shapes, particle systems, breathing at emotion BPM). 15 unit tests all passing. Full suite: 2,069 tests across 48 suites. Committed as 3f0ff75, pushed to origin.

Phase K (Developer Documentation) complete. Created HOW_TO_ADD_A_FEATURE.md (step-by-step guide from data model to tests), ONBOARDING.md (new developer setup in 15 min), wrote 8 ADRs (5 missing: 004-Clerk, 005-MCP, 007-Docker, 009-RateLimit, 010-WCAG + 3 new: 011-Visual Identity, 012-Performance, 013-Expo Mobile), refreshed API_REFERENCE.md from ~20 routes to comprehensive 530+ route coverage. Updated docs/README.md as hub index. 13 files changed, 1,679 insertions. Committed as 359223d, pushed to origin.

Modal cleanup: Paused holly-video-generate (A10G, 0 calls) and holly-image-generate (T4, 0 calls). Deleted volumes: holly-flux-weights (53.9 GiB), holly-cogvideo-weights (20.1 GiB), holly-maya1-weights (6.3 GiB), holly-voxcpm2-weights (0 B). Kept only holly-models (616 MiB) for holly-api. Estimated savings: ~$22-25/month, dropping from 80% to ~15-20% of $30 budget. Maya was Holly's old TTS — no longer needed. Modal CLI broken on Steve's machine (Python 3.14 + missing grpclib) — use dashboard instead.

Phase L committed and pushed to main. Holly's Voice Character Engine live. 13 emotions (11 + intimate + passionate), NVIDIA Magpie primary TTS, Kokoro fallback, 42 voice tests, 2,111 total. Commit follows Phase K.
